# Agentheim Instruction Baseline

This directory is the binding instruction surface for repository agents.

Read in this order:

1. `00-instruction-priority.md`
2. `01-doctrine.md`
3. `02-forbidden-behaviors.md`

The goal is a minimal baseline. Add new instruction files only when the repository truly needs a new standing rule rather than a one-off task note.

These files are development-only governance. They are not product documentation and must not be used as evidence of user-facing runtime features.
